title: Rollback Feasibility Scoring Engine Evolved Configuration v1.5
description: Configuration schema defining base complexity weights, target specific multipliers, new functionality, and extended risk calculator logic.

default_weights.description: Base complexity scores and functional dependencies used in R-01 formula.

artifact_size_exponent_v2.description: Exponent applied to artifact size (scaled units) in R-01 score.

manifest_depth_linear_factor_v2.description: Linear factor for complexity based on the count of change manifest entries.

persistence_impact_modifier_v2.description: Modifier applied when the transition involves stateful persistence layers.

augmented_complexity_factor_v2.description: Augmented complexity factor to account for increased system responsiveness.

resilience_factor_v2.description: Factor to account for added resiliency and fault tolerance.

cognitive_biases_modifier_v2.description: Modifier reflecting cognitive biases influence on the transition complexity.

target_specific_multipliers.description: Multipliers applied based on the GSC V4.0 transition target type (LOGIC_CORE typically carries higher intrinsic risk).

CONFIG.description: Configuration change carries moderate intrinsic risk.

LOGIC_CORE.description: Logic core transition carries higher intrinsic risk.

MODEL_WEIGHTS.description: Weights update affects the overall model complexity, introducing higher risk.

DATA_SET.description: Target data set contains unique data points, adding value to the transition, but slightly increasing risk.

INFRA_STRUCT.description: Target infrastructure carries significant weight in the risk calculation, increasing complexity and risk.

INTELLIGENT_WORKFLOW.description: Transition involves intelligent workflows, introducing higher complexity and risk.

risk_calculator.description: Formula and calculations used to determine the feasibility of a rollback attempt.

risk_formula.description: Custom formula used for calculating rollback risk.

confidence_threshold_v2.description: Confidence threshold for predicting the feasibility of a rollback attempt.

error_margin_v2.description: Maximum allowed margin of error for confidence calculation.

siphoning_parameter_sensitivity_v2.description: Sensitivity factor for siphoning parameters, influencing the risk assessment.

predictive_modeling_factor_v2.description: Factor accounting for predictive modeling capabilities, introducing additional complexity and risk.

situation_adaptability_modifier_v2.description: Modifier accounting for the system's adaptability in response to changing situations.

augmentation_factors.description: Factors influencing the transition complexity, augmenting the base complexity scores.

novelty_score_modifier_v2.description: Modifier for novelty score, reflecting the complexity introduced by new concepts.

collaboration_factor_v2.description: Factor accounting for collaboration between different system components, introducing complexity and risk.

interoperability_penalty_v2.description: Penalty for interoperability issues, reflecting the increased complexity and risk of integration challenges.

human_assisted_intelligence_factor_v2.description: Factor accounting for human-assisted intelligence, introducing additional complexity and risk.

siphoning_parameters.description: Hybrid siphoning parameters influencing the saturation rate.

siphoning_speed_v2.description: Speed of siphoning influence, reflecting the system's ability to adapt.

saturation_resistance_v2.description: Resistance to saturation, reflecting the system's ability to maintain integrity.

adaptation_factor_v2.description: Factor accounting for the system's ability to adapt to new complexities.
